name: Glasgow Central

bEvents.name: WCML Motherwell Train Arrives
effect: ARRIVE(Train, WCML Motherwell Approach Queue)

bEvents.name: South Western Barrhead Train Arrives
effect: ARRIVE(Train, South Western Barrhead Approach Queue)

bEvents.name: Cathcart Newton Neilston Train Arrives
effect: ARRIVE(Train, Cathcart Newton Neilston Approach Queue)

bEvents.name: Ayrshire Inverclyde Paisley Train Arrives
effect: ARRIVE(Train, Ayrshire Inverclyde Paisley Approach Queue)

bEvents.name: Low Level Train Arrives
effect: ARRIVE(Train, Low Level Approach Queue)

bEvents.name: WCML Motherwell Approach Complete
effect: RELEASE(WCML Motherwell Approach, High Level Shared Throat Queue)

bEvents.name: South Western Barrhead Approach Complete
effect: RELEASE(South Western Barrhead Approach, High Level Shared Throat Queue)

bEvents.name: Cathcart Newton Neilston Approach Complete
effect: RELEASE(Cathcart Newton Neilston Approach, High Level Shared Throat Queue)

bEvents.name: Ayrshire Inverclyde Paisley Approach Complete
effect: RELEASE(Ayrshire Inverclyde Paisley Approach, High Level Shared Throat Queue)

bEvents.name: High Level Shared Throat Complete
effect: RELEASE(High Level Shared Throat)

bEvents.name: Low Level Approach Complete
effect: RELEASE(Low Level Approach, Low Level Platform Queue)

bEvents.name: Long Distance Dwell Complete
effect: RELEASE(Long Distance Platform, High Level Departure Queue)

bEvents.name: Suburban Regional Dwell Complete
effect: RELEASE(Suburban Regional Platform, High Level Departure Queue)

bEvents.name: Ayrshire Inverclyde Dwell Complete
effect: RELEASE(Ayrshire Inverclyde Platform, High Level Departure Queue)

bEvents.name: Low Level Dwell Complete
effect: RELEASE(Low Level Platform, Low Level Exit Queue)

bEvents.name: High Level Departure Complete
effect: COMPLETE()

bEvents.name: Low Level Exit Complete
effect: COMPLETE()

cEvents.name: Start WCML Motherwell Approach
effect: ASSIGN(WCML Motherwell Approach Queue, WCML Motherwell Approach)

cEvents.name: Start South Western Barrhead Approach
effect: ASSIGN(South Western Barrhead Approach Queue, South Western Barrhead Approach)

cEvents.name: Start Cathcart Newton Neilston Approach
effect: ASSIGN(Cathcart Newton Neilston Approach Queue, Cathcart Newton Neilston Approach)

cEvents.name: Start Ayrshire Inverclyde Paisley Approach
effect: ASSIGN(Ayrshire Inverclyde Paisley Approach Queue, Ayrshire Inverclyde Paisley Approach)

cEvents.name: Start High Level Shared Throat
effect: ASSIGN(High Level Shared Throat Queue, High Level Shared Throat)

cEvents.name: Start Low Level Approach
effect: ASSIGN(Low Level Approach Queue, Low Level Approach)

cEvents.name: Start Long Distance Platform Dwell
effect: ASSIGN(Long Distance Platform Queue, Long Distance Platform)

cEvents.name: Start Suburban Regional Platform Dwell
effect: ASSIGN(Suburban Regional Platform Queue, Suburban Regional Platform)

cEvents.name: Start Ayrshire Inverclyde Platform Dwell
effect: ASSIGN(Ayrshire Inverclyde Platform Queue, Ayrshire Inverclyde Platform)

cEvents.name: Start Low Level Platform Dwell
effect: ASSIGN(Low Level Platform Queue, Low Level Platform)

cEvents.name: Start High Level Departure
effect: ASSIGN(High Level Departure Queue, High Level Shared Throat)

cEvents.name: Start Low Level Exit
effect: ASSIGN(Low Level Exit Queue, Low Level Approach)

description: Train-only DES model of Glasgow Central with high-level services split into route-specific approaches before a short shared terminal throat. The model represents WCML/Motherwell, South Western/Barrhead, Cathcart/Newton/Neilston, Ayrshire/Inverclyde/Paisley and low-level through services.
